revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{各世紀アジアの軍人}} {{デフォルトソート:20くんしん}} [[Category:20世紀の軍人|+アジア]] [[Category:20世紀アジアの人物|+くんしん]] [[Category:各世紀の軍人]]」
各世紀アジアの軍人で統一するのが筋かと思います。[[Category:各世紀の軍人]]を除去; [[Category:各世紀アジアの軍人]]を追加 ([[WP:HotCat|HotCat]]使用)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work

Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Copying from [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] to [[Category:11]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{各世紀アジアの軍人}}
{{デフォルトソート:20くんしん}} ==Local Content== {{各世紀アジアの軍人}} {{citation needed|20くんしん}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:20世紀アジアの軍人}} {{translated page|ja|20世紀アジアの軍人|2=Category:20世紀アジアの軍人|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:20世紀アジアの軍人|version=91728061}} [[ja:Category:20世紀アジアの軍人]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:Tōgō_Heihachirō]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:20th-century Asian people]] [[Category:20th-century military personnel]] [[Category:Asian Military Personnel by Century]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tōgō_Heihachirō]] [[Category:Categories]]
